name: tabby
description: Tabby — a cat lives in your browser and grows with your online life. Everything stays on your device.

scripts.zip: pnpm locales && wxt zip && node scripts/verify-build-output.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
scripts.assets: pnpm sync:ort && pnpm sync:speech-model && pnpm locales && pnpm animations
scripts.postinstall: wxt prepare && node scripts/sync-ort-wasm.mjs && node scripts/sync-speech-model.mjs && node scripts/generate-locales.mjs
